'''Menndo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who, like most of his [[Species/Legends|species]], began his career working as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. However, he later learned that greater profits could be earned with less hassle in the endeavors of [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] and [[Spy/Legends|espionage]] rather than collecting [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> Menndo worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="CSWE" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as an expert assassin.<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> He was often hired when a high-ranking [[Politics/Legends|political]] official had to be eliminated,<ref name="CSWE" /> and he was linked to the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of several such officials during his career.<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />

Menndo had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> After discovering his new career path, he became an excellent assassin.<ref name="Rebellion Guide">[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> Menndo's name translated to "poor" in the [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]] [[Language/Legends|language]].<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> He wore a beige [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]] with a reddish [[Clothing/Legends|vest]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />

==Behind the scenes==
Menndo was created for the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] as one of the playable characters available to the Galactic Empire.<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> In gameplay, Menndo is most appropriately used for assassination missions, and he is also well suited for conducting espionage missions against heavily defended [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Planet/Legends|systems]].<ref name="Rebellion Guide" /> Like all of the other minor playable characters, Menndo has a randomly generated chance, through game mechanics, to become [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. If that mechanic is generated for Menndo, he can undergo [[The Force/Legends|Force]] training by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />
